title: Bangalore Assembly and Placement — The Breach
description: Drennan's second Bangalore section, recovered from the surf, combined with the section already at the shingle, gives a full two-section charge — enough to cut a gap eight feet wide through the concertina wire. Drennan's verbal assembly instructions, delivered from the ground where he cannot move, are precise: the sections thread together at the coupling collar, the firing assembly attaches at the rear, and the whole apparatus is pushed through the wire from the dead zone approach identified in Szymanski's testimony. This is the physical mechanism by which the draw opens. Everything else — Szymanski's grid reference, Reed's radio, McCook's guns — is preparation for the moment this charge detonates.
